about.title: About Me
about.p1: Hi! I'm Isabella Médici, a lashes and brows specialist passionate about enhancing each client's unique beauty.
about.p2: With years of experience and refined techniques, I offer services that enhance your gaze and provide natural, long-lasting results.
about.p3: Every appointment is personalized, designed especially for you.
